recommended.song_name: Have You Ever Seen The Rain

content:
Only Wanna Be With You
Words and music by Hootie and The Blowfish
Transcription by Andy Citron (andycitron@hotmail.com)
              and Keith Frechette (kfrechet@us.ibm.com)

This version is different from whats already on OLGA in
the following ways:  1) its written in the actual key
Hootie plays it in.  2) It attempts to show where the 
'stops' or 'accents' are 3) It has chords and words for 
the entire song.  

[Intro]
Accoustic guitar and high-hat: [[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^]x3 [[ch]D#6[/ch] - - -]
Add drums and bass: [[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^]x4

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]        [ch]D#6[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]                 [ch]D#6[/ch]
  You and me, we come from diff'rent worlds.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]            [ch]D#6[/ch]             [ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]D#6[/ch]
  You like to laugh at me when I look at other girls.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                 [ch]D#6[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]D#6[/ch]
  Sometimes you're crazy    and you wonder why[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]D#6[/ch]          [ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]D#6[/ch]
  I'm such a baby 'cause the Dolphins make me cry.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G#m7[/ch](add4) 
Well there's nothing I can do.           lick 1 time[/tab]
[tab][ch]B(add9)[/ch]                                 [[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^]x2
  I've been looking for a girl like you.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]            [ch]D#6[/ch]      [ch]F#[/ch]             [ch]D#6[/ch]
  You look at me, you got nothing left to say.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]D#6[/ch]        [ch]F#[/ch]       [ch]D#6[/ch]
  I moan and pout at you until I get my way.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]        [ch]D#6[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]        [ch]D#6[/ch]
  I won't dance,   you won't sing.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]D#6[/ch]             [ch]F#[/ch]             [ch]D#6[/ch]
  I just want to love you, but you want to wear my ring.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G#m7[/ch](add4) 
Well there's nothing I can do.[/tab]
[tab][ch]B(add9)[/ch]
  I only wanna be with you.         hit hit[/tab]
[tab][[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^][[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^]      [ch]B(add9)[/ch] 
                        You can call me your fool,[/tab]
[tab][[[ch]D#6[/ch] ^ - -                     ] [[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^]x2
        only wanna be with you.[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]         [ch]D#6[/ch]          [ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]D#6[/ch]
  Put on a little Dylan,   sitting on a fence.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]             [ch]D#6[/ch]              [ch]F#[/ch]          [ch]D#6[/ch]
  I say, "That line is great." You ask me what I meant by[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]D#6[/ch]          [ch]F#[/ch]                 [ch]D#6[/ch]
  "Said I shot a man named Gray,   took his wife to Italy.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]D#6[/ch]
  She inherits a million bucks and when she[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]D#6[/ch]
Died it came to me.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G#m7[/ch](add4) 
I can't help it if I'm lucky."[/tab]
[tab][ch]B(add9)[/ch]
  Only wanna be with you.[/tab]
[tab][[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^][[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]C#7sus[/ch] ^]    [ch]B(add9)[/ch] hold
                        Ain't Bobby so cool?[/tab]
[tab][[ch]C#sus[/ch] - - -                     ] [[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^]x4 (solo starts)
        Only wanna be with you.[/tab]

[Guitar solo] [[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^]x4

[tab]          [ch]G#m7[/ch](add4) 
Yeah, I'm tangled up in blue,[/tab]
[tab][ch]B(add9)[/ch]
  Only wanna be with you.[/tab]
[tab][[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^][[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^]      [ch]B(add9)[/ch] 
                        You can call me your fool,[/tab]
hit hit
[[ch]D#6[/ch] ^ - -][- - - -]
[tab][- - - -]                    [[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^]x2
     only wanna be with you.[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]            [ch]D#6[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]            [ch]D#6[/ch]
  Sometimes I wonder,   if will ever end.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]D#6[/ch]           [ch]F#[/ch]         [ch]D#6[/ch]
  You get so mad at me when I go out with my friends.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]D#6[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]        [ch]D#6[/ch]
  Sometimes you're crazy    and you wonder why[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]D#6[/ch]          [ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]D#6[/ch]
  I'm such a baby, yeah, the Dolphins make me cry.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G#m7[/ch](add4) 
Well there's nothing I can do.[/tab]
[tab][ch]B(add9)[/ch]
  Only wanna be with you.       hold[/tab]

                        You can call me your fool,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#6[/ch]               [[ch]F#[/ch] ^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^]x2
  Only wanna be with you.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B(add9)[/ch]
Yeah, I'm tangled up in blue,  hit hit[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#6[/ch]                [[ch]F#[/ch] ^[ch]D#6[/ch] ^]
  Only wanna be with you.[/tab]

[tab]3 times [ch]F#[/ch]^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^                 [ch]F#[/ch]^ [ch]D#6[/ch] ^     
            Only wanna be with you.     [/tab]
